tracks.meaning: a device or mechanism that fastens or secures something in a closed position
a section or curl of hair
to hold someone or something firmly in a fixed position
a section of a canal or waterway with gates at each end to raise or lower water levels and allow vessels to pass
a device used to secure doors, containers, or valuables against unauthorized access
a wrestling hold in which a limb is held firmly in place
a mechanism that prevents simultaneous access to a shared resource by multiple processes
to prevent access or use of something, especially in a legal or official capacity
something that is certain to happen or succeed
to focus one's attention or gaze on someone or something intensely
in rugby, a forward player in a scrum formation
to engage in a conflict or confrontation with someone
